data.title: US DOJ Disbands Crypto Enforcement Unit
data.description:
The DOJ's memo declared an end to the 'regulation by prosecution' strategy, marking a major win for the crypto industry.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/us-doj-disbands-crypto-enforcement-unit/

data.title: Bitcoin and Altcoin Spot Trading Volumes Decline Amid Market Volatility: CryptoQuant
data.description:
Bitcoin trading volumes dropped substantially in Q1 2025, from $44 billion to $10 billion, according to CryptoQuant. Altcoin volumes also fell, but Binance gained market share as the leading exchange.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-and-altcoin-trading-volumes-drop-in-q1-2025-cryptoquant/

data.title: 'Eve Frontier' Game Trial Will Open 'Eve Online' Ethereum Spinoff to All
data.description:
Kicking off Friday, a 10-day free trial for Eve Frontier will let all players get a taste of the upcoming Eve Online spinoff game.
source: https://decrypt.co/314209/eve-frontier-game-trial-ethereum-spinoff

data.title: SEC approves options on spot Ether ETFs
data.description:
The United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has approved options trading for multiple spot Ether exchange-traded funds (ETFs), a move that may broaden the investment appeal of Ether among institutional traders. The SEC issued the approval on April 9 after reviewing a proposed rule change submitted by BlackRock for its iShares Ethereum Trust (ETHA) on July 22, 2024. Similar approvals were granted to Bitwise Ethereum ETF (ETHW), Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE), and Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust (ETH), as well as Fidelity Ethereum Fund (FETH). “[T]he Exchange proposes to amend its rules to permit the listing and trading of options on the Trust,” the SEC said in its response to the Nasdaq, adding:The Exchange states that options on the Trust will provide investors with an additional, relatively lower cost investing tool to gain exposure to spot ether as well as a hedging vehicle to meet their needs in connection with ether products and positions
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-approves-options-spot-ether-etfs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: XRP address count hits record high as new ETF debuts
data.description:
XRP addresses holding at least 1 token reached more than 6 million as Teucrium Investment Advisors launched a leveraged XRP ETF in the U. S.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/6m-xrp-addresses-a-record-high-as-etf-volume-hits-5m-on-u-s-debut

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 83,000 USDT with a 7.84% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 09, 2025, 20:58 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 83,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 83,118.867188 USDT, with a narrowed 7.84% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin News: Price Above $80K After Trump Declares Tariffs Pause
data.description:
President Trump may have just delivered one of the most bullish Bitcoin news stories that the market has received in a while. The crypto market has responded positively in what could possibly be the start of a major recovery, or that’s what market participants hope for.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/09/bitcoin-news-price-above-80k-after-trump-declares-tariffs-pause/

data.title: U.S. Treasury Statement on Wealth Distribution Doubted
data.description:
U. S. Treasury unconfirmed wealth distribution statement raises skepticism. Market irregularities demand clarity.
source: https://coincu.com/331238-wealth-distribution-us-treasury-doubted

data.title: The Daily: Bitcoin tops $81,000 after tariff pause, lawmakers push crypto bills, Magic Eden acquires Slingshot Finance
data.description:
Binance plans to launch the reward-bearing margin asset LDUSDT for its futures platform and the former Ethereum developer Virgil Griffith gets out of prison on parole.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350303/the-daily-bitcoin-tops-81000-after-tariff-pause-lawmakers-push-crypto-bills-magic-eden-acquires-slingshot-finance?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Pro-crypto lawmaker Wiley Nickel announces Senate candidacy in North Carolina
data.description:
Former Democratic Rep. Wiley Nickel has officially kicked off a campaign to challenge North Carolina Republican Sen. Thom Tillis. Nickel is an attorney and former Obama administration staffer, who served one term in the House before redistricting made him give up his seat to the Republicans. According to footage he shared via his X account, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pro-crypto-lawmaker-wiley-nickel-announces-senate-candidacy-in-north-carolina/
